title: Delicate Decadent Roasted Herring Wrap
description: A light and refreshing monsoon American dish featuring herring wrapped in a soft wrap. The herring is roasted with aromatic spices using a mortar-pestle method.

ingredients.name: wrap of your choice (e.g. cucumber, avocado, or lettuce wrap)

instructions: Mix all-purpose flour and salt in a small bowl.
Coat herring fillets with the flour mixture, ensuring they are lightly coated on both sides.
Heat olive oil in a mortar-pestle bowl over medium heat.
Add chopped thyme leaves and cumin seeds to the mortar-pestle bowl and pound until fragrant.
Place herring fillets in the mortar-pestle bowl. Pour the aromatic flour mixture over them, allowing it to soak in.
Transfer soaked herring to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle more olive oil on top of each fillet.
Roast for 20 minutes or until the herring is golden brown and cooked through.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before wrapping in your choice of wrap.
Serve immediately as a light, decadent snack.
